HookId.description: Stable identifier for a configured hook.

HookPatch.description: Typed patch intents used by rewrite hooks.

oneOf.description: Replace assistant text content in the latest model response.
Mutate tool result payload before it is persisted.

HookPatchEnvelope.description: Stable envelope emitted for async patch publication.

HookReasonCode.description: Typed reason codes for guardrail denials.

SessionId.description: Unique identifier for a session (UUID v7 for time-ordering)

SkillId.description:
Skill identifier — newtype for type safety.

The canonical format is a slash-delimited path: `{collection-path}/{name}`.
Examples: `"extraction/email-extractor"`, `"a/b/c"`, `"pdf-processing"`.

ToolConfigChangeOperation.description: Operation kind for live tool configuration changes.

ToolConfigChangedPayload.description: Payload for tool configuration change notifications.

AgentEvent.description:
Events emitted during agent execution

These events form the streaming API for consumers.

oneOf.description: A rewrite patch was applied synchronously.
A background patch was published for downstream surfaces.
Text generation complete for this turn

has_images.description: Whether the tool result contains image content blocks.

estimated_history_tokens.description: Estimated total history tokens before compaction.

input_tokens.description: Input tokens from the last LLM call that triggered compaction.

oneOf.description: Context compaction failed (non-fatal — agent continues with uncompacted history).
A skill reference could not be resolved.
An interaction completed successfully (terminal event for tap subscribers).
An interaction failed (terminal event for tap subscribers).

Some streaming events were dropped due to channel backpressure.
Best-effort marker — the terminal event is authoritative.
Live tool configuration changed for this session.

StreamScopeFrame.description: Scope attribution frame for multi-agent streaming.

oneOf.description: Mob member scope for flow dispatch turns.

ScopedAgentEvent.description: Attributed stream event wrapper for multi-agent streaming.

WireEvent.description: Event envelope: session_id, sequence, event (AgentEvent), contract_version
WireEvent.note: AgentEvent schema is emitted above. known_event_types stays as a lightweight canonical inventory for surface drift checks.
